full_text:
Quan Rou 全柔
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Quan Rou (全柔)was born in Qiantang county in Wu commandery. Man of local family. Managed to bring in grain during famine. Quan Rou was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and the Wu Kingdom.
